active_ingredients: Active Ingredient Neomycin Sulfate 5 mg (equivalent to 3.5 mg Neomycin)
Active Ingredient Polymyxin B Sulfate 5000 units
indications_and_usage: Use(s) First aid to help prevent infection in minor cuts, scrapes, and burns
dosage_and_administration: Directions Clean the affected area. Apply a small amount of this product (an amount equal to the surface area of the tip of a finger) on the area 1 to 3 times daily. May be covered with a sterile bandage.
